textByHash.2bbcd6e76b32c768d91608ee609444b88848537d: ... not to mention what happens when the Queen sends her forces to recover the Prince.
textByHash.7667bb1261380ec0cce52994608b5f6ae13bae3a: Unfounded? Do you not see how risky this plan is? We should have stuck with Servius rather than revealing ourselves.
textByHash.aa9aae587f0d58a0b08361017eac940747d0a801: It won't matter how many options we have if we don't live long enough to see them through. You keep gambling with our future here!
textByHash.e3d07a4c70312bc0e21201c13c1492768463b27f: A fool is what he is.
textByHash.4b6e7da12cb262d047cf2bb0b0d57a04d7790b62: If you have any better suggestions, I'm all ears...
textByHash.ccc518b7c79e7cca916d53fef5c295fb967ce500: Calm yourself, brother. Arguing gets us nowhere. Tell us, dwarf, can it be done?
textByHash.9222f8ce4c77fbe377c7c632a4b70aec9dc5ab9d: And where will we find one of those?
textByHash.ed7dac042c6b6df81007c8caec85f3aa6c208ae6: You will have it. Just make sure you are ready.
textByHash.1ab48976192aa16094acf2d850d0b5d3a3d807ca: She's gone, Ennius! Don't you see? We've been abandoned!
textByHash.c2d6a4ff76ea28f76c95643f1e1e4523981b1d60: Gods?! My dear brother, how are you this much of a fool?
textByHash.f839dbd3e7b4b938a524c92066f52bb4af8510ff: Why? Because it was you who betrayed your people! You destroyed everything we stood for when you decided to open our kingdom! You are not worthy of the throne!
textByHash.6bf4bb7dcbb83985687cb10229f89b553dc0a0bb: I was creating a future for us, brother!
textByHash.84a140f4acf523beeed14c5974938b55d2ec4b99: Save your fury, brother. This one is unworthy of it.
textByHash.7a8583a81b058f4ba17e32c8c732d3fd5906a35b: Do not air your dirty laundry in public, brother.
textByHash.6e12ab3d88e945b00ca418a8bd06cffcee101460: You. The Prince wishes to speak with you. He awaits you at the temple.
textByHash.57ff7b6b6b2ac3733f79565e6f6a2e39dce6ce6d: On the other side of the bazaar, south of here.
textByHash.1071c50c38d4029b37df34bf35fc6e9a10545908: The Prince is waiting for you. You'll find him in the temple to the south, on the other side of the bazaar.
textByHash.795a237f6106c1ce431a809a906899460654ca79: I do not believe that was a compliment, brother.
textByHash.6f2bd191926c61694a0aedf21238413d589c334c: It is wise to keep the Teokan under close protection, and we are well placed to support this investigation.
textByHash.9b028682ffc6446150f21769e6b35b44853a7a7b: The delegation consisted of six knights. Given recent events, I requested they make us aware of their activities. I suggest you seek them out and ask them to return here.
textByHash.2047e0271c755192d7e00c9d42ca3ec7e93145f4: Arrun and Claudia should be at the bazaar. Nel will be at the cothon. Velam and Azali are somewhere in Outer Fortis, likely at the pub. Mezan will be at the colosseum.
textByHash.d3010d7253be64f8a11a6420c4660cb3f52fd917: This crest will mark you as a representative of the Queen herself. Show it to them and they will not refuse.
textByHash.7476cf7f021e66498cdc2cac71f16a686773f3aa: From here, just take the eastern path past the museum. Once you reach the water, you have found the cothon.
textByHash.fd881be3631580fd1d14b2d2829acb6bf282835d: It's the part of the city outside the main walls. Head south from here and you'll find it on the other side of the gates.
textByHash.0ba6d3b53fb6f997c0a684bc7ecdbae26c757e5d: Mezan will likely already be inside. I'd suggest searching the training area for him.
textByHash.5154e0d588c8f85be601ba2be18d39ce174f7cb4: Take this crest. It will mark you as a representative of the Queen herself. Show it to the knights and ask them to return here.
textByHash.c74c70cc6aafbc82d058457149745591516aa4ff: We will have it dealt with. For now, take another. However, I suggest you take more care this time.
textByHash.f1e54829ad24b43db5b30c3e35b38059eb91ac4c: Have you spoken to all the knights?
textByHash.7184ba2bb850db2160f894e7794d62c8c4aa4bab: After they were picked for the delegation, the knights were granted beds in the Kualti Headquarters, just west of here. I would suggest you search there for anything of note.
textByHash.6d0d31f4d09730ce606c645ad0f7c2955498f25b: While my brother may have been a touch too hasty, he is right. What's done is done. You should return to the Prince and let him know.
textByHash.8c2b8ed6ef6fdd68cc625e5af2e7e64238309ff4: You'll find the Teomat atop Ralos' Rise, but it's quite the walk from here. You should speak to Regulus Cento outside about a faster method of travel.
textByHash.e8fc09da6a35836579c8c1e08af23379aa7cc338: Speak to Regulus Cento outside about a faster method of travel. You'll likely need it if you wish to travel to the Teomat.
